source_jobs.title: Unity Developer AI
source_jobs.description:
We are Joyteractive - a leading mobile game developer and publisher specializing in the captivating world of puzzle games. Today, our team boasts 60+ rockstar professionals, and we're on the lookout for talented individuals to help us dominate the world of puzzles!

Our flagship game, Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle, consistently ranks in the top word puzzle games in the US:

🏆 #1 in the Cryptogram niche by downloads

✏️ #2-3 in Word Games

🧩 Top 10 Puzzle Games in the US for the last 6 months



We’re looking for an experienced Unity Developer AI to join our R&D team.



For which tasks (responsibilities)?

 - Researching, prototyping, and integrating AI-powered solutions into Unity projects and internal R&D pipelines.

 - Integrating AI tools and workflows for content generation, gameplay systems, automation, and development acceleration.

 - Rewriting old mechanics and creating new ones.

 - Creating UI animations (DOTween / Animator)

 - Optimization of Canvas redrawing.

 - Improved UI response (animations, buttons, feedback for the player).
   
   

What kind of professional are we looking for?

 - At least 4 years of programming experience in C#/Unity 2D game development experience.

 - Strong knowledge of C# and experience working with Unity tools

 - Strong architectural thinking and ability to design maintainable and extensible systems.

 - Deep understanding of software architecture, OOP, SOLID principles, and design patterns.

 - Strong knowledge of Unity engine internals and Unity tooling ecosystem.

 - Hands-on experience using AI tools to accelerate development, prototyping, or content production.

 - The ability to work with UI optimization (redrawing, batching, atlases).

 - Experience working with legacy code.

 - Experience working with UniTask, DOTween, Zenject, Addressables.

 - Experience with Git/Github.
   

Will be a plus

 - Experience integrating LLM/AI solutions into game development pipelines.

 - Experience building AI-assisted tools or editor extensions for Unity.

 - Experience with React Native, especially in the context of hybrid applications, tooling, or rapid prototyping workflows.

 - Knowledge of Shader Graph or HLSL.

 - Experience working with mobile optimization (CPU, GPU, RAM).

 - Experience with integration of analytics and advertising SDKs (Firebase, AppMetrica, Unity Ads, ironSource)

 - Experience working with client-server architecture in the context of game development
   

What are the conditions and bonuses?

For your success we offer:

🌴 18 business days of compensated day-offs

8 paid Personal Days a year + 1 day is added every year

👉 Flexible Public Holidays policy

❤️‍🩹 100% Sick Leave compensation

💻 Payment for wear and tear on equipment while using a personal computer

🌐 Remote work

source_jobs.title: Head of Analytics
source_jobs.description:
We are Joyteractive - a leading mobile game developer and publisher specializing in the captivating world of puzzle games. Today, our team boasts 60+ rockstar professionals, and we're on the lookout for talented individuals to help us dominate the world of puzzles!

Our flagship game, Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle, consistently ranks in the top word puzzle games in the US:

🏆 #1 in the Cryptogram niche by downloads

✏️ #2-3 in Word Games

🧩 Top 10 Puzzle Games in the US for the last 6 months



We’re looking for a Head of Analytics to lead and develop our analytics function.



For what tasks?

 - Lead the analytics function across the studio and define the strategic direction for product and marketing analytics

 - Develop and improve analytical tools and approaches, identify growth opportunities, improve the quality of working with metrics, and make analytics practical and business-oriented

 - Lead and develop analytics processes: standardize approaches to data collection, metric interpretation, experiment evaluation, and forecasting

 - Define and develop A/B testing and experimentation methodology end-to-end — from experiment design to results analysis, ensuring reliable conclusions and well-grounded decisions

 - Collaborate with product, marketing, and technical teams, translating data into clear recommendations and helping to define product priorities

 - Drive a data-informed culture across the studio, increase the maturity of the analytical approach, and strengthen the role of metrics in product and marketing processes



What kind of professional are you looking for?

 - 2+ years of experience as a Lead Analytics or Head of Analytics in mobile game development, with proven involvement in product and business decision-making

 - 3+ years of experience in product analytics within mobile games

 - Experience working at the intersection of product and marketing analytics, including traffic quality evaluation, its economic efficiency, and impact on product performance

 - Deep understanding of ads, hybrid, and in-app monetization models

 - Strong knowledge of mathematical statistics

 - Extensive experience in A/B testing

 - Technical proficiency required to work with metrics and analytics systems, as well as to collaborate effectively with technical teams

 - Strong communication skills and the ability to explain complex analytical insights in a clear and structured way

 - Russian fluent



For your success we offer:

🌴 18 business days of compensated day-offs

8 paid Personal Days a year + 1 day is added every year

👉 Flexible Public Holidays policy

❤️‍🩹 100% Sick Leave compensation

💻 Payment for wear and tear on equipment while using a personal computer

🌐 Remote work

source_jobs.title: Senior UI/2D Artist
source_jobs.description:
🚀 We are Joyteractive - a leading mobile game developer and publisher specializing in the captivating world of puzzle games. Today, our team boasts 80+ rock star professionals, and we're on the lookout for talented individuals to help us dominate the world of puzzles!

🔝 Our leader is Cryptogram: Word Brain Puzzle - #3 spot among all iOS/Android word games in the US.

We're on the hunt for a skilled Senior UI/2D Artist to strengthen our RnD team.

What are you working on?

 - Genres: Puzzle, Casual

 - Platforms: iOS, Android, Mobile
   
   

For which tasks (responsibilities)?

 - Develop and design UI/UX for mobile games (iOS, Android), focusing on puzzle genre.

 - Use AI tools to speed up content production

 - Create simple graphic assets, including icons, logos, and other small-scale visual elements to complement the user interface.

 - Participate in the creation of a universal interface template for projects (standard screens, guidelines, design system)

 - Prepare and adapt graphic materials, including slicing for various devices and resolutions

 - Conduct market analysis, study competitive solutions, and implement best practices into products

 - Testing, as well as optimize user flows to improve conversion rates.

 - Collaborate with the product team and developers at all stages of product creation, participate in reviews and discussions

 - Maintain and support the design system, document processes, and establish interface design standards
   
   

What kind of professional are we looking for?

 - Experience as a 2D UI/UX Artist for 3+ years with a focus on mobile games (casual, puzzles, hyper-casual)

 - Strong expertise in Figma

 - Deep understanding of UX/UI principles for mobile platforms

 - Strong analytical skills, understanding of key metrics, and the ability to apply them to improve UX

 - Knowledge of layout principles and interface adaptation for different devices and resolutions

 - Willingness to work in a fast-paced environment, initiative, independence in decision-making, and high-quality execution
   
   

Will be a plus:

 - Experience with Unity

 - Experience with UI animations and VFX

 - Experience with other graphic packages

 - Knowledge of the basics of game design and the specifics of game interfaces
   
   

What are the conditions and bonuses?

For your success we offer:

🌴 18 business days of compensated day-offs

8 paid Personal Days a year + 1 day is added every year

👉 Flexible Public Holidays policy

❤️‍🩹 100% Sick Leave compensation

💻 Payment for wear and tear on equipment while using a personal computer

🌐 Remote work

notes: Mobile game developer with a strong focus on puzzle games.
